"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lab4_run.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\lab4_run.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lab4_run.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lab4_run.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o lab4_run.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblab4_run.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lab4_run.dir\linkLibs.rsp
